recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure with Scope 3 Emissions Reporting
recommendations.description: Publish a comprehensive TCFD-aligned report including Scope 3 financed emissions to maintain ESG leadership and attract ESG-mandated investments.
recommendations.profitability_link: Matching SBI's approach could attract ₹3000 Cr in ESG FII inflows, improving valuation by 5-10%, potentially adding ₹150-300 Cr in market cap.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India published TCFD report and improved CDP rating attracting ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows

recommendations.title: Implement Quarterly ESG Governance Reporting
recommendations.description: Ensure timely filing of SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Reports to avoid regulatory penalties and maintain investor confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding potential SEBI penalties and trading restrictions saves estimated ₹10 Cr in fines and cost of capital increases.

recommendations.title: Leverage ESG Leadership in Investor Communications
recommendations.description: Develop targeted investor presentations and disclosures emphasizing YES BANK's top S&P Global CSA ESG ranking to maximize valuation premium and investor trust.
recommendations.framework_section: Dow Jones Sustainability Index, Edelman Trust Barometer
recommendations.profitability_link: Enhancing ESG narrative can sustain a 5-10% valuation premium on ₹6000 Cr market cap, adding ₹300-600 Cr in valuation.

recommendations.title: Invest in ESG Data Management Systems
recommendations.description: Upgrade ESG data collection and management infrastructure to improve accuracy and timeliness of disclosures, supporting compliance and investor confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved data quality can reduce risk of non-compliance and support valuation premium, potentially preserving ₹150-300 Cr in market cap.
